steps.title: Identify the growth factor from the percentage
steps.content: A 2.4% increase means each year's value is 100% + 2.4% = 102.4% of the previous year. Converting to decimal: 102.4% = 1.024.

steps.title: Build the exponential function
steps.content: With initial value 174,000 and growth factor 1.024, the exponential function is $f(x) = 174,000(1.024)^x$. This matches choice C — C is correct.
